attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ,
COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER 
(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ROWS BETWEEN 1
FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
TVOUTPUT.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM,
TVOUTPUT.NODE_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.NODE_VALUE_CD, 
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC)
AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NMHNT_OUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) 
AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT  
MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
BATCH_ID,
START_TV_DT ,
DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM,
NODE_ID_INT,
MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
NODE_TYPE,
PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
NODE_VALUE_CD, 
ACTION_CODE,
EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY, NODE_TYPE,PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT ,NODE_VALUE_CD, MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  /* Added node_value, node_desc ,PI change */ /* NODE_ID_INT */ /* Removed NODE_ID as key is based on NODE_ID*/
ORDER  BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
FROM(
SELECT 
SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY AS MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY 
,SOSHP.BATCH_ID
,CAST(SOSHP.PUBLISHED_DATE AS DATE) START_TV_DT
,SMHN.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY
,SOSHP.NODE_DESC AS MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  
,SOSHP.NODE_ID AS NODE_ID_INT
,WIOSHPM.LEVEL_NO AS MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT    
,CASE WHEN SOSHP.NODE_ID= 6680 AND SOSHP.NODE_TYPE='E' THEN 'ROOT'
WHEN SOSHP.NODE_TYPE='D' THEN 'LEAF'
ELSE 'MIDDLE' END AS NODE_TYPE                     
,PARENT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY AS PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY  
,SOSHP.NODE_VALUE AS NODE_VALUE_CD 
,SOSHP.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,SOSHP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                
,'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE                     
FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED SOSHP
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SMHN
ON ( SOSHP.NODE_ID = SMHN.NODE_ID_INT
   /* SOSHP.NODE_DESC = SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM
   AND SOSHP.NODE_VALUE = SMHN.NODE_VALUE_CD */
 )
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WIOSHPM
ON (WIOSHPM.NODE_ID = SOSHP.NODE_ID
AND WIOSHPM.PARENT_NODE_ID = SOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID)
INNER JOIN (
SELECT SOSHP.NODE_ID,SOSHP.NODE_VALUE,SOSHP.NODE_DESC,SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY 
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT SOSHP 
,$$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SMHN
WHERE  
    SOSHP.NODE_ID = SMHN.NODE_ID_INT
   /*  SOSHP.NODE_VALUE = SMHN.NODE_VALUE_CD
AND SOSHP.NODE_DESC = SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM */
) PARENT
ON ( SOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID = PARENT.NODE_ID)
WHERE SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY AS MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY 
,SOSHP.BATCH_ID
,CAST(SOSHP.PUBLISHED_DATE AS DATE) START_TV_DT
,SMHN.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY
,SOSHP.NODE_DESC AS MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  
,SOSHP.NODE_ID AS NODE_ID_INT
,WIOSHPM.LEVEL_NO AS MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT    
,CASE WHEN SOSHP.NODE_ID= 6680 AND SOSHP.NODE_TYPE='E' THEN 'ROOT'
      WHEN SOSHP.NODE_TYPE='D' THEN 'LEAF'
      ELSE 'MIDDLE' END AS NODE_TYPE                     
,NULL AS PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY  
,SOSHP.NODE_VALUE AS NODE_VALUE_CD 
,SOSHP.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,SOSHP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                
,'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE                     
FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED SOSHP
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SMHN
ON ( SOSHP.NODE_ID = SMHN.NODE_ID_INT
 /* SOSHP.NODE_DESC = SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM
                AND SOSHP.NODE_VALUE = SMHN.NODE_VALUE_CD */
)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WIOSHPM
ON (WIOSHPM.NODE_ID = SOSHP.NODE_ID
AND WIOSHPM.PARENT_NODE_ID = SOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID)
WHERE SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT'
AND SOSHP.NODE_ID=6680
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY AS MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY 
,EOSHP.BATCH_ID
,CAST(EOSHP.PUBLISHED_DATE AS DATE) START_TV_DT
,SMHN.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY
,EOSHP.NODE_DESC AS MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM  
,EOSHP.NODE_ID AS NODE_ID_INT
,WIOSHPM.LEVEL_NO AS MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT    
,CASE WHEN EOSHP.NODE_ID= 6680 AND EOSHP.NODE_TYPE='E' THEN 'ROOT'
WHEN EOSHP.NODE_TYPE='D' THEN 'LEAF'
ELSE 'MIDDLE' END AS NODE_TYPE                     
,PARENT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY AS PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY  
,EOSHP.NODE_VALUE AS NODE_VALUE_CD 
,EOSHP.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EOSHP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE                
,'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE                     
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED EOSHP
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SMHN
ON ( EOSHP.NODE_ID = SMHN.NODE_ID_INT
/* EOSHP.NODE_DESC = SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM
AND EOSHP.NODE_VALUE = SMHN.NODE_VALUE_CD */
)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WIOSHPM
ON (WIOSHPM.NODE_ID = EOSHP.NODE_ID
AND WIOSHPM.PARENT_NODE_ID = EOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID)
INNER JOIN (
SELECT WIOSHPM.NODE_ID, WIOSHPM.NODE_VALUE, WIOSHPM.NODE_DESC,SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY 
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WIOSHPM
,$$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SMHN
WHERE   WIOSHPM.NODE_ID = SMHN.NODE_ID_INT
 /* EOSHP.NODE_VALUE = SMHN.NODE_VALUE_CD
AND EOSHP.NODE_DESC = SMHN.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM */
) PARENT
ON ( EOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID = PARENT.NODE_ID)
WHERE EOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT'
UNION ALL
SELECT  
NMHNT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
- 999 BATCH_ID,
NMHNT.START_TV_DT,
NMHNT.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
NMHNT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM,
NMHNT.NODE_ID_INT,
NMHNT.MGMT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
NMHNT.NODE_TYPE,
NMHNT.PARENT_MGMT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
NMHNT.NODE_VALUE_CD,   
NMHNT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'X' ACTION_CODE,
'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV  NMHNT  
WHERE EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM 
(SELECT NODE_ID /* NODE_VALUE,NODE_DESC */ FROM $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED WHERE HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT'
UNION ALL 
SELECT NODE_ID /* NODE_VALUE,NODE_DESC */ FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED WHERE HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT')SEOSHP
WHERE  SEOSHP.NODE_ID=NMHNT.NODE_ID_INT
  /* SEOSHP.NODE_VALUE=NMHNT.NODE_VALUE_CD 
AND SEOSHP.NODE_DESC=NMHNT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NM */
)
AND NMHNT.END_TV_DT=16000101  
)TVINPUT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) =1            
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV NMHNT_OUT
ON TVOUTPUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY = NMHNT_OUT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY
AND NMHNT_OUT.END_TV_DT =16000101
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT RANK () OVER 
  (ORDER BY SOSMP.NODE_ID) + MAX_VAL MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
  NODE_VALUE AS  NODE_VALUE_CD,SOSMP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY , SOSMP.NODE_DESC MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM ,NODE_ID FROM
(
SELECT
 SEOSHP.NODE_VALUE, SEOSHP.NODE_DESC,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,SEOSHP.NODE_ID
FROM 
       ( SELECT SOSHP.NODE_VALUE,SOSHP.NODE_DESC ,SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE ,NODE_ID
         FROM $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED SOSHP 
         UNION ALL 
         SELECT EOSHP.NODE_VALUE,EOSHP.NODE_DESC,EOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE  ,NODE_ID
         FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED EOSHP
       ) SEOSHP 
       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP 
ON SEOSHP.NODE_VALUE=NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE=16000101 
WHERE SEOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT' 
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SEOSHP.NODE_VALUE, SEOSHP.NODE_DESC,NFD.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,SEOSHP.NODE_ID FROM
  ( SELECT SOSHP.NODE_VALUE,SOSHP.NODE_DESC ,SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE ,NODE_ID
         FROM $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED SOSHP 
         UNION ALL 
         SELECT EOSHP.NODE_VALUE,EOSHP.NODE_DESC,EOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE  ,NODE_ID
         FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED EOSHP
       ) SEOSHP 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD ON
BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SEOSHP.NODE_VALUE
where SEOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT' 
 ) SOSMP,
(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE) SPMN
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE SPMN 
   WHERE SOSMP.NODE_ID =SPMN.NODE_ID_INT )

SELECT 
SOSHP.BATCH_ID                      
,SOSHP.CREATED_BY                    
,SOSHP.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOSHP.GES_GLOBAL_NAME               
,SOSHP.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SOSHP.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE                
,SOSHP.LEVEL_NO                      
,SOSHP.NODE_DESC                     
,SOSHP.NODE_ID                       
,SOSHP.NODE_TYPE                     
,SOSHP.NODE_VALUE                    
,SOSHP.PARENT_DESC                   
,SOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID                
,SOSHP.PUBLISHED_DATE                
,SOSHP.PUBLISHED_STATUS              
,SOSHP.UPDATED_BY                    
,SOSHP.UPDATE_DATE                   
,SOSHP.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOSHP.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED SOSHP
 WHERE  SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT'AND SOSHP.NODE_TYPE ='E'
AND
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
	WHERE SOSHP.NODE_VALUE=NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
	AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE = 16000101)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
SOSHP.BATCH_ID                      
,SOSHP.CREATED_BY                    
,SOSHP.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOSHP.GES_GLOBAL_NAME               
,SOSHP.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SOSHP.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE                
,SOSHP.LEVEL_NO                      
,SOSHP.NODE_DESC                     
,SOSHP.NODE_ID                       
,SOSHP.NODE_TYPE                     
,SOSHP.NODE_VALUE                    
,SOSHP.PARENT_DESC                   
,SOSHP.PARENT_NODE_ID                
,SOSHP.PUBLISHED_DATE                
,SOSHP.PUBLISHED_STATUS              
,SOSHP.UPDATED_BY                    
,SOSHP.UPDATE_DATE                   
,SOSHP.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOSHP.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED SOSHP
 WHERE  SOSHP.HIERARCHY_TYPE='MANAGEMENT'AND SOSHP.NODE_TYPE ='D'
AND
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_TV NFD
	WHERE SOSHP.NODE_VALUE= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
	AND NFD.END_TV_DATE = 16000101)
